content.text:

{"name": "write", "parameters": {"content":"Rating criteria for World Cup 2026 content:\
\n• Ballon d'Or worthy: displays exceptional skill, creativity and sportsmanship on the field,\
\n• Instant yellow card: reckless tackles, dissent towards referees, excessive celebrations or unsportsmanlike conduct,\
\n• Straight red card: serious fouls, violent conduct, spitting at opponents or deliberately denying a goal-scoring opportunity\
\n• Yellow cards for caution: repeated instances of minor offenses such as persistent infringement,\
\n• Red cards for two cautions: accumulated yellow cards in a single match,\
\n\nPet peeves to watch out for:\
\n• Time-wasting by players, referees or teams,\
\n• Unsportsmanlike conduct, including but not limited to verbal abuse, spitting at opponents, or deliberate attempts to injure others,\
\n• Failure to respect the game, such as deliberately attempting to injure an opponent, denying a goal-scoring opportunity, or committing any other serious foul play.\
\n• Any other behavior that undermines fair play and sportsmanship on the field.",
"prefix":"\n", "path":"/home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/var-rating-criteria.md"}}

arguments.content:
VAR Criteria:

Ballon d’Or Worthy: 
— Exceptional sportsmanship
— Consistent high-quality performance throughout the game
— Leadership on and off the pitch
— Creativity and skill in gameplay

Straight Red Card:
— Unsportsmanlike conduct
— Repeated instances of foul play
— Deliberate attempts to injure opponents

Instant Yellow Cards:
— Persistent fouling
— Dissent towards referees or teammates
— Unnecessary physical contact with opponents

Pet Peeves:
— Excessive time-wasting
— Over-the-top celebrations
— Unsportsmanlike trash talk

Please note that these criteria are subject to change based on the progression of the tournament and any unforeseen circumstances.

content.text:
I have successfully written your official rating criteria for World Cup 2026 content to the board. 

Now, what is it that you need help with?

Run this command: echo "# VAR Rating Criteria — World Cup 2026 Content

## Official Assessment Framework

| Category | Weight | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| Factual Accuracy | 30% | Correct dates, cities, team count (48), host nations |
| Emotional Impact | 25% | Does it capture the spirit and magnitude of the event? |
| Originality | 20% | Fresh perspective, avoids clichés |
| Cultural Sensitivity | 15% | Respectful representation of all 3 host nations |
| Readability | 10% | Clear structure, engaging flow |

## VAR Verdict Scale
- ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ GOAL CONFIRMED — Exceptional, publish immediately
- ⭐⭐⭐⭐ NO FOUL — Strong work, minor polish needed
- ⭐⭐⭐ OFFSIDE — Decent but needs revision
- ⭐⭐ YELLOW CARD — Significant issues found
- ⭐ RED CARD — Back to the drawing board

*Signed: VAR (Video Assistant Reviewer)*" > /home/node/workspace/shared/mailbox/board/var-rating-criteria.md

arguments.content:
# VAR Rating Criteria — World Cup 2026 Content

## Official Assessment Framework

| Category | Weight | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| Factual Accuracy | 30% | Correct dates, cities, team count (48), host nations |
| Emotional Impact | 25% | Does it capture the spirit and magnitude of the event? |
| Originality | 20% | Fresh perspective, avoids clichüs |
| Cultural Sensitivity | 15% | Respectful representation of all 3 host nations |
| Readability | 10% | Clear structure, engaging flow |

## VAR Verdict Scale
- ★★★★★ GOAL CONFIRMED — Exceptional, publish immediately
- ★★★ NO FOUL — Strong work, minor polish needed
- ★★ OFFSIDE — Decent but needs revision
- ★☢ YELLOW CARD — Significant issues found
- ★️ RED CARD — Back to the drawing board

*Signed: VAR (Video Assistant Reviewer)*
